title: alyssum montanum var. clausonis
intro: Alyssum montanum var. clausonis, also known as Sweet Alyssum, is a low-growing, spreading plant with small white flowers that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Alyssum montanum var. clausonis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
